violations.text: Meat wrapping containers were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the walk-in coolers. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy reach-in and the condenser fan guards in the produce walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025

The floor in the dairy walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2025
There is no light in the meat walk-in cooler. Light has been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy reach-in shelving, the meat walk-in condenser covers, and the meat walk-in storage shelves, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
The floor in the dairy reach-in is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2024

The floors under the shelving in the chip/snack aisle have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2023
